label: L-System 分形
description: 基于 Lindenmayer 系统的分形/分支结构生成器，通过文法规则迭代重写和海龟绘图解释，在网格上生成道路网络、河流水系、有机分支、空间填充曲线等拓扑结构
description-en: Lindenmayer system fractal/branching generator: iteratively rewrites a grammar string then interprets it as turtle-graphics commands to produce road networks, river deltas, organic branches, space-filling curves, and other topological structures on a grid.
icon: 从一点向上生长的分支树状结构，主干分出多个分支，分支再递归分出更小的分支，形成分形图案，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 输入掩码网格，非零区域为绘制区域，L-System 图形将自动缩放到此区域内
inputs.description-en: Input mask grid; non-zero cells define the drawing area. The L-system output is auto-scaled to fit within this region.

inputs.name: preset
inputs.label: 预设模式
inputs.description: 预设配置：none=自定义, organic_branch=有机分支（洞穴/根系）, river_delta=河流三角洲, road_network=正交道路网络, fractal_tree=分形树, dragon_curve=龙曲线, hilbert_curve=希尔伯特空间填充曲线。选择预设后公理、规则、迭代次数、角度、朝向、衰减参数自动锁定为预设值；线条宽度、角度抖动、内边距等仍可自由调节
inputs.description-en: Preset: none=custom, organic_branch, river_delta, road_network, fractal_tree, dragon_curve, hilbert_curve. When a preset is active, core L-system params (axiom, rules, iterations, angle, startAngle, widthDecay, lengthDecay) are locked to preset values; drawing params (lineWidth, angleJitter, padding, etc.) remain freely adjustable.

inputs.name: axiom
inputs.label: 公理
inputs.description: L-System 的初始字符串（公理）。选择预设后此项被忽略，由预设自动配置；仅 preset=none 时生效
inputs.description-en: Initial axiom string. Ignored when a preset is active (preset provides its own axiom); only effective when preset=none.

inputs.name: rules
inputs.label: 产生规则
inputs.description: 产生规则，格式："符号=替换" 用分号分隔多条规则。支持随机规则：用 | 分隔多个备选项，可选 :权重 后缀。例："F=F[+F]F[-F]F" 或 "F=FF:2|F[+F]:1;X=FX"。选择预设后此项被忽略
inputs.description-en: Production rules: "symbol=replacement" separated by ";". Stochastic: separate alternatives with "|", optional ":weight" suffix. Ignored when a preset is active.

inputs.name: iterations
inputs.label: 迭代次数
inputs.description: 规则重写迭代次数，每次迭代将所有可匹配符号替换为其规则产物。值越大结构越复杂、越密集
inputs.description-en: Number of rule-rewriting iterations. Each pass replaces all matching symbols. Higher values produce more complex structures.

inputs.name: angle
inputs.label: 转向角度
inputs.description: 海龟遇到 + 或 - 时的转向角度（度）。90°产生正交结构，22~30°产生自然分支，60°/120°产生雪花/三角形
inputs.description-en: Turtle turn angle in degrees for + and - commands. 90° → orthogonal; 22-30° → natural branching; 60°/120° → snowflake/triangular.

inputs.name: startAngle
inputs.label: 初始朝向
inputs.description: 海龟初始朝向角度：0=向上, 90=向右, 180=向下, 270=向左

inputs.name: lineWidth
inputs.label: 线条宽度
inputs.description: 基础线条宽度（像素）。分支深层的实际宽度 = lineWidth × width（受 widthDecay 衰减）
inputs.description-en: Base line width in pixels. Actual branch width = lineWidth × accumulated widthDecay.

inputs.name: widthDecay
inputs.label: 宽度衰减
inputs.description: 每次进入分支 [ 时线条宽度的衰减因子（0~1）。0.7=分支明显变细, 1.0=不衰减
inputs.description-en: Width decay factor per branch push [. 0.7 = branches noticeably thinner; 1.0 = no decay.

inputs.name: lengthDecay
inputs.label: 长度衰减
inputs.description: 每次进入分支 [ 时步长的衰减因子（0~1）。0.7=分支段明显缩短, 1.0=不衰减
inputs.description-en: Step-length decay factor per branch push [. 0.7 = branch segments much shorter; 1.0 = no decay.

inputs.name: angleJitter
inputs.label: 角度抖动
inputs.description: 每次转向时叠加的随机扰动范围（±度），打破对称性使结构更自然，也使随机种子产生可见差异。0=完全确定性（种子无效）, 3=微妙自然, 5~15=明显有机感, >20=高度随机
inputs.description-en: Random angle perturbation range (±degrees) per turn, breaking symmetry and making the seed produce visible variation. 0=fully deterministic (seed has no effect), 3=subtle, 5-15=moderate organic, >20=highly random.

inputs.name: padding
inputs.label: 内边距
inputs.description: L-System 图形与掩码边界之间的内边距（像素），防止图形紧贴边缘
inputs.description-en: Inner padding in pixels between the L-system output and mask boundary.

inputs.name: constrainToMask
inputs.label: 约束到掩码
inputs.description: 是否将绘制限制在掩码非零区域内。开启时掩码外的像素不会被绘制
inputs.description-en: Constrain drawing to non-zero mask cells. When enabled, pixels outside the mask are not drawn.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，影响角度抖动和随机规则选择。0=使用当前时间戳自动生成。注意：当 angleJitter=0 且规则为确定性时，种子不产生任何效果
inputs.description-en: Random seed for angle jitter and stochastic rules. 0 uses the current timestamp. Note: seed has no effect when angleJitter=0 and rules are deterministic.

outputs.name: grid
outputs.label: L-System 网格
outputs.description: 输出网格：L-System 结构区域值为 1，其余为 0
outputs.description-en: Output grid: L-system structure cells = 1, all others = 0.

alg_tag: 基于文法规则的分形/分支结构生成
可用于道路、河流、植被、迷宫路径等拓扑网络
